commercialRule: Scheduled backups run silently without opening PowerShell/CMD windows, and update downloads use a direct GitHub asset download path to the user's Downloads folder.
releaseNotes: Replaces noisy scheduled backup window with a silent Windows scheduled task using a hidden VBS/PowerShell runner.
Disables older visible EKlinics/Inventra/DentalStock scheduled backup tasks that open a console window.
Adds a direct fast update downloader that downloads the installer to Downloads/Inventra Updates.
Supports GitHub redirect/CDN downloads with cache-busting and timeout protection.
Falls back to opening the direct installer URL in the browser if the internal downloader is unavailable.
No SQL is run automatically by this patch.
No local app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, sync logic, or account logic is deleted.
